info.title: Matchbook API
info.description: Self-hosted agency finance ops — invoice collection, reconciliation, reporting.

post.description: Manual PDF upload — extracts via LLM, stores invoice.
Trigger a new job (gmail_sync, portal_scrape, reconcile).
Upload a bank statement file, parse via LLM, store transactions.
Trigger LLM matching for a given period.

delete.description: Reject (delete) a match — resets invoice and transaction to unmatched.

post.description: Confirm a match — updates invoice and transaction status.

patch.description: Reassign a match to a different invoice and/or transaction.

get.description: Get invoice history for a vendor.
Detect vendors with missing invoices based on billing cycle + last invoice date.

parameters.name: as_of

schema.description: Check for missing invoices as of this period (YYYY-MM). Defaults to current month.
schema.title: As Of

parameters.description: Check for missing invoices as of this period (YYYY-MM). Defaults to current month.

get.description: Monthly spend summary — totals, invoice count, match breakdown.

parameters.name: period

schema.description: Period filter (YYYY-MM). Defaults to current month.
schema.title: Period

parameters.description: Period filter (YYYY-MM). Defaults to current month.

get.description: Expenses grouped by category for the given period.

parameters.name: period

schema.description: Period filter (YYYY-MM). Defaults to current month.
schema.title: Period

parameters.description: Period filter (YYYY-MM). Defaults to current month.

get.description: Expenses grouped by vendor for the given period.

parameters.name: period

schema.description: Period filter (YYYY-MM). Defaults to current month.
schema.title: Period

parameters.description: Period filter (YYYY-MM). Defaults to current month.

get.description: VAT breakdown by rate for the given period.

parameters.name: period

schema.description: Period filter (YYYY-MM). Defaults to current month.
schema.title: Period

parameters.description: Period filter (YYYY-MM). Defaults to current month.

get.description: Month-over-month spend comparison for the given year.

parameters.name: year

schema.description: Year to compare months for. Defaults to current year.
schema.title: Year

parameters.description: Year to compare months for. Defaults to current year.

post.description: Generate a financial report in PDF or Excel format.
Preview what a report would contain without generating it.

Send a message and receive a streaming response.

Uses Server-Sent Events (SSE) to stream the assistant's response.

MatchConfirm.title: MatchConfirm
MatchConfirm.description: Confirm a match — sets confirmed_by to 'user' and confirmed_at to now.

MatchReassign.title: MatchReassign
MatchReassign.description: Reassign a match to a different invoice or transaction.
